SourceProxy.name: ImageColorProjector
SourceProxy.label: Project Image Colors to Point Cloud

Documentation.short_help: Project colors from a vtkDataSet onto a point cloud.

SourceProxy.Documentation:
Takes a vtkPolyData point cloud at port 0 and a vtkDataSet at port 1, and assigns each point the RGB color sampled from the grid using nearest-neighbor in grid index space when the grid is a 2D plane.
Choose which axis to drop (X, Y, or Z) to define the image plane. Indices are computed by projecting onto this plane using the grid basis.

StringVectorProperty.name: ColorArrayName
StringVectorProperty.label: Color Array
StringVectorProperty.Documentation: Name of the array from the input image dataset used to color the point cloud. If empty, the filter tries PNGImage then the active scalars.

IntVectorProperty.name: Image Plane
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: Select the orientation of the image plane in world coordinates. The plane is defined by dropping the selected axis and projecting with the grid basis. Default is the XY plane.
